title: Minimal Magic
body:
Minimal Magic adds multiple blocks to help ease automation. These are called runes.

Right now, Minimal Magic adds:

 - Envy rune: Acts like a vacuum hopper, absorbing nearby items and dropping them below. This rune has an upgrade, which allows you to select where to drop the items. More info in game.

 - Killer rune: Allows you to hurt mobs

 - Materialization rune: Allows you to place blocks

 - Entropy rune: allows you to break blocks

Most of them need to have a location bound: using a position binder you can right click some block and then shift right click the rune to bind the position to the rune.

Minimal Magic is in an extremely early stage and there's still lots to be done. Planned are more runes (examples are better versions of the entropy rune and killer rune, automatic planting, ways to fully automate runes, etc...), a magic spell system, a progression system and more. Note that releases at this point are alpha.
